metadata.name: Process an Expense Against a Matter

description: An attorney incurred an expense (e.g., a filing fee) and needs to have it recorded against the correct client matter for billing.

nodes.task_description: Receive the expense details (amount, date, description) and the client/matter code.

expected_outcome.value: Agent has all the necessary information.

nodes.task_description: Enter the expense into the billing system, associating it with the correct matter.
Attach a copy of the receipt to the expense entry for auditing purposes.

expected_outcome.value: The expense is fully documented in the system.
